languages.text: "Благодарственные процессии с чествованием Лорд-капитана... Леди Теодора любила их. Считала дешевым и эффективным способом самоподдержания морального состояния экипажа".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Ах да, благодарственные процессии. Необходимое зло, чтобы поддерживать дух экипажа. Теодора их, впрочем, любила".
"Благодарственные процессии с чествованием Лорд-капитана... Леди Теодора любила их. Считала дешевым и эффективным способом самоподдержания морального состояния экипажа".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: "Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."
languages.original_text: "Благодарственные процессии с чествованием Лорд-капитана... Леди Теодора любила их. Считала дешевым и эффективным способом самоподдержания морального состояния экипажа".

traits.locale_text: "Gratitude processions honouring the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."
"Gratitude processions honouring the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."
"Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."
"Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."
"Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."

languages.text: "Prozessionen, die dem Lord Captain danken ... Lady Theodora mochte sie sehr. Sie hielt sie für ein preiswertes und effektives Mittel, die Moral der Crew zu stärken."
languages.original_text: "Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."

traits.locale_text: "Prozessionen, die dem Lord Captain danken ... Lady Theodora mochte sie sehr. Sie hielt sie für ein preiswertes und effektives Mittel, die Moral der Crew zu stärken."

languages.text: « Ces processions en l'honneur d'un seigneur-capitaine... Dame Theodora les appréciait beaucoup. Elle considérait qu'il s'agissait d'un moyen peu coûteux, mais efficace de maintenir le moral de l'équipage. »
languages.original_text: "Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."

traits.locale_text: « Ces processions en l'honneur d'un seigneur-capitaine... Dame Theodora les appréciait beaucoup. Elle considérait qu'il s'agissait d'un moyen peu coûteux, mais efficace de maintenir le moral de l'équipage. »

languages.text: “向舰长大人谢恩的游行……西奥多拉夫人对这种活动很是偏爱。她认为，这是维系船员士气既经济又有效的手段。”
languages.original_text: "Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."

traits.locale_text: “向舰长大人谢恩的游行……西奥多拉夫人对这种活动很是偏爱。她认为，这是维系船员士气既经济又有效的手段。”

languages.text: «Procesiones en agradecimiento a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán... A lady Theodora le encantaban. Consideraba que era una forma barata y eficaz de mantener alta la moral de la tripulación».
languages.original_text: "Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."

traits.locale_text: «Procesiones en agradecimiento a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán... A lady Theodora le encantaban. Consideraba que era una forma barata y eficaz de mantener alta la moral de la tripulación».

languages.text: ああ、そうだ、感謝祭の行列だ。乗組員の士気を保つための必要悪だ。テオドラは大好きだったけどね」。
languages.original_text: Ah, yes, thanksgiving processions. A necessary evil to keep the crew's spirits up. Theodora loved them, though."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan'a şükran sunan geçit törenleri... Leydi Theodora onlara bayılırdı. Mürettebatın moralini yüksek tutmak için onları ucuz ve etkili bir araç olarak görürdü."
languages.original_text: "Processions giving thanks to the Lord Captain... Lady Theodora was fond of them. She considered them an inexpensive and effective means of maintaining the crew's morale."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan'a şükran sunan geçit törenleri... Leydi Theodora onlara bayılırdı. Mürettebatın moralini yüksek tutmak için onları ucuz ve etkili bir araç olarak görürdü."
